barRaise.topFinding: Two things moved in opposite directions this cycle. Substantive code work resumed: the 06-04 "doc-only stall" eased with v0.94.0 (dispatch ladder rebuild) shipping and an in-flight v0.94.2 housing-rename pass (Bivouac to Crew Pod, Prefab Hut to Prefab Module) sitting in 18 uncommitted files, so velocity is no longer flat. But the rename touched the exact fog-of-war dispatch lines that have been broken for weeks and corrected only their comments, leaving every armed tower and every housing tier still falling through to the default vision tier (`fog_of_war.gd:480-497`). The new headline is an observability bug discovered this run: `scripts/write-dashboard-status.ps1:99-106` hardcodes the entire `barRaise` block to null on every release, which is why nine prior bar-raise reports have left `hbh.json.barRaise` all-null and the dashboard has never once shown an HBH verdict. The same script hardcodes a stale, mislabelled milestone (`M3 / "Mid-game enemy variety"` against a GDD active milestone of M4 Pre-Production Lock), so the prior "set the JSON milestone" action was never going to stick. Render-lane indecision is now in its fourth unactioned cycle.
